chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.2726 of 2024. ------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: Order with signature(s) of the Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ For Hearing of Bail Application. 26th March, 2025. Mr. Nadeem Ahmed Azar advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ali Haider Salim, Addl. P.G. Sindh. ************ After arguing at length, learned counsel for the applicant does not press instant bail application on the plea that learned trial court may be directed to conclude the trial within one month. Accordingly, instant bail application is dismissed as not pressed with direction to the learned trial Court to conclude the trial preferably within one month from the date of receipt of this order. JUDGE M.Zeeshan
